\tzpentry{ID3603}{Propagator Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3603 introduces Propagator Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} G(\vec{r}, \vec{r}', \mu_r) = \frac{1}{4\pi|\vec{r} - \vec{r}'|} + \sum_{l=0}^\infty \sum_{m=-l}^l a_{lm}(\mu_r) \frac{(r_<)^l}{(r_>)^{l+1}} Y_l^m(\theta, \phi) Y_l^{m*}(\theta', \phi') \end{equation}
